summary: Defines version 4 of the Border Gateway Protocol, the inter-domain routing protocol of the Internet. Specifies the AS_PATH attribute, including AS_SEQUENCE and AS_SET segment types, AS-path-based loop detection, and AS-path length as a route-selection criterion. Obsoletes RFC 1771; the authoritative reference for AS-path structure and interpretation.
title: A Border Gateway Protocol 4 (BGP-4)
